findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: Signature block content is duplicated in the HTML. 'Sincerely,' appears twice and 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer' appears twice — once within a pasted signature image block and once as separate text below it.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a single 'Sincerely,' followed by the handwritten signature and a single 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer'. HTML shows 'Sincerely,' as body text, then a signature image that also contains 'Sincerely,' and the name/title, then 'David Miller, PE' and 'State Mining Engineer' repeated again as standalone text.
